summary: Exchange Tax Calculator feature testing complete. All new endpoints work correctly. POST /exchanges/tax/calculate, GET /exchanges/tax/form-8949, GET /exchanges/tax/form-8949/csv all verified. Free users correctly get 403. ExchangeModal UI shows Import and Tax Calculator tabs. Tax year and asset filtering work correctly.

minor.issue: Pre-existing: Affiliate alphanumeric codes rejected with 400. Not related to exchange tax feature.

flaky_tests.test: core-flows.spec.ts - Invalid wallet address shows error
flaky_tests.issue: Login sometimes stuck at 'Logging in...' state. Pre-existing flaky test issue.

regression_results.note: 4 failures are pre-existing flaky test issues unrelated to new feature

success_rate.backend: 100% (44/44 exchange tests, 92/94 all backend tests - 2 pre-existing affiliate failures)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (18/18 exchange tests - new feature tests all pass)

seed_data_creation: Test users created dynamically with unique timestamps
context_for_next_testing_agent: Exchange Tax Calculator feature fully tested. New tests added: 24 backend tests in test_exchange_tax.py (POST /exchanges/tax/calculate, GET /exchanges/tax/form-8949, GET /exchanges/tax/form-8949/csv). 9 new frontend tests added to exchange.spec.ts for Tax Calculator tab UI. All tests pass. ExchangeModal now has two tabs (Import CSVs and Tax Calculator). Free users correctly get 403 on all tax endpoints.

backend.test_exchange_tax.py: 24 passed - NEW exchange tax calculator tests

frontend.exchange.spec.ts: 18 passed - includes 9 new Tax Calculator tests

features_verified: POST /api/exchanges/tax/calculate - calculates tax from CSV imports, requires Unlimited
GET /api/exchanges/tax/form-8949 - returns Form 8949 line items, requires Unlimited
GET /api/exchanges/tax/form-8949/csv - exports Form 8949 as CSV file, requires Unlimited
ExchangeModal has Import and Tax Calculator tabs
Tax Calculator shows cost basis and capital gains summary
Free users get 403 for all exchange tax endpoints
